name: Medallion Metals Limited
summary: Medallion Metals Limited, a resources exploration and development company, explores for precious and base metals. It explores for gold, silver, copper, lead, and zinc deposits. The company's principal property is the 100% owned Ravensthorpe Gold Project covering an area of approximately 280 square kilometers located in Western Australia. Medallion Metals Limited was incorporated in 2015 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
